---
title: "GSU Resource"
date: "2026-05-08"
description: "List of many useful resources in Georgia State University"
tags: ["tutorial", "computing"]
categories: ["resources", "Georgia State University"]
output:
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    theme: readable
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r resource-heading-indent, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
input <- knitr::current_input()
src <- if (is.null(input) || input == "") getwd() else dirname(normalizePath(input, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE))
fp <- normalizePath(file.path(src, "..", "..", "static", "css", "resource-section-indent.css"), mustWork = FALSE)
if (!is.na(fp) && file.exists(fp)) {
  cat("<style type=\"text/css\">\n",
      paste(readLines(fp, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n"),
      "\n</style>\n", sep = "")
}
```

Here are list of the available resources in [Georgia State University](https://www.gsu.edu/) (GSU).

## Computing

+ [Advanced Research Computing Technology, Innovation & Collaboration](https://arctic.gsu.edu/) (ARCTIC): Computing Cluster managed by GSU.

+ [Hydra](https://hydra.gsu.edu/): Where you submit the Tickets for issues related to computing.

+ [SASonDemand](https://welcome.oda.sas.com/): Online SAS computing platform

+ [sites@gsu](https://sites.gsu.edu/): Get the school server hosted webpage.
    + E.g., [my page](https://sites.gsu.edu/cyeh/) 

## Seminar

+ [Atlanta Combinatorics Colloquium](https://tomkelly.math.gatech.edu/acc/index.html)

+ 

## Conferences

### 2026

+ [SLDS 2026](https://asa-slds.github.io/slds2026/): Inference and Intelligence

    Date/Time: November 1-3, 2026
    Location: Marriott at the Brooklyn Bridge, New York City, NY

+ 

# TBA
